questions: What is a hole in one?
answers: Golf is a precision sport where players use clubs to hit a ball into a series of holes on a course in as few strokes as possible. A standard course has 18 holes, and the player with the lowest score wins.

The greatest golfers include Tiger Woods, Jack Nicklaus, Arnold Palmer, and modern stars like Rory McIlroy and Jon Rahm. Tiger Woods' dominance in the late 90s and 2000s transformed the sport globally.
Golf has four major championships — The Masters, US Open, The Open Championship (British Open), and PGA Championship. Winning all four is called the Grand Slam, achieved only by a handful of legends.
